# programs.atuin

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `programs.atuin`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `programs.atuin.daemon.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Atuin daemon. |
| `programs.atuin.daemon.logLevel` | `null or one of “trace”, “debug”, “info”, “warn”, “error”` | Verbosity of Atuin daemon logging. |
| `programs.atuin.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable atuin. |
| `programs.atuin.enableBashIntegration` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Bash integration. |
| `programs.atuin.enableFishIntegration` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Fish integration. |
| `programs.atuin.enableNushellIntegration` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Nushell integration. |
| `programs.atuin.enableZshIntegration` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Zsh integration. |
| `programs.atuin.flags` | `list of string` | Flags to append to the shell hook. |
| `programs.atuin.forceOverwriteSettings` | `boolean` | When enabled, force overwriting of the Atuin configuration file ( $XDG_CONFIG_HOME/atuin/config.toml ). Any existing Atuin configuration will be lost. |
| `programs.atuin.package` | `package` | The atuin package to use. |
| `programs.atuin.settings` | `Atuin configuration` | Configuration written to $XDG_CONFIG_HOME/atuin/config.toml . |
| `programs.atuin.themes` | `attribute set of (TOML value or absolute path or strings concatenated with “\n”)` | Each theme is written to $XDG_CONFIG_HOME/atuin/themes/theme-name.toml where the name of each attribute is the theme-name |
